report.technique: Greyscale and Doppler ultrasound of the abdomen.
report.findings: Liver normal echogenicity. Gallbladder distended without stones. CBD 4 mm. Pancreas obscured by bowel gas. Right kidney 10.2 cm without hydronephrosis. Left kidney 10.0 cm without hydronephrosis. Spleen normal. Aorta normal caliber. Bladder partially distended.
report.impression: 1. No acute biliary or renal abnormality.
